channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Junction of Rochester Road and Kentish Town Road, 8th March
item.description:
Lime and first bikes blocking the clearly marked and signposted disabled parking bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Rochester Road and Kentish Town Road, 8th March
item.description:
Lime and first bikes blocking the clearly marked and signposted disabled parking bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge destroyed, 8th March
item.description:
Another grass verge destroyed by vehicles driving over. This verge is regularly targeted. Needs posts as well as repair. Please don’t tell me contractors will take relevant action or I’ll keep coming back and asking what that is.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Openreach or electrical company fouling public land, 8th March
item.description:
Outside no.71 complete mess left by person working on pole on Friday 6th. Assume was from open reach or electric company. Health hazard, eye sore and criminal dumping. Please remove and recharge to perp!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchwood Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old Abandoned car on Tuam Road parked in opposite direction on a one way road, 8th March
item.description:
This car has been here for over month, and is parked facing in the opposite direction as the road is one way. It’s a very old car and appears To be abandoned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tuam Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gathering of cars and loitering youths threatening violence, 8th March
item.description:
.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carysfort Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: About 50cm pot hole after turning into Bryant avenue., 8th March
item.description:
Pothole has been growing over the past couple weeks. About 15cm (minimum) deep and about 50cm x 30cm length and width

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour in ground floor garden flat dumped rubbish at 4am, 8th March
item.description:
I live at Aberfeldy House (block entrance 1). I took my dog out for a comfort break at 4 am where I witnessed the middle aged guy who live in ground floor garden flat on corner (red garden gate) take broken furniture and detritus over to the tree area and just dump it. When I got up to my flat I saw him carry a few more items and dump them. This is disgusting behaviour and inexcusable as on the other side of the block there is ample space to leave rubbish. Please do something about it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warham Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: When it rains, puddles form on the side of the road like this, making it difficult to cross., 8th March
item.description:
Water collects on the sides of the roads every time it rains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seven Sisters Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders’ rubble dumped in communal areas and front porch of flats., 7th March
item.description:
A resident in the block is fly-tipping builders’ rubble from renovation works in the communal areas and then dumping it on the front porch/garden area of the block of flats. The waste is accumulating in shared spaces, creating obstruction, an untidy appearance, and a potential safety hazard for residents and visitors. Please investigate and arrange removal of the dumped construction waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olney Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken road, 7th March
item.description:
Sunken road around grid, cycle lane 259 Woolwich Road. Dangerous.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Warped road, 7th March
item.description:
Warped road on junction of Rathmore Rd/Woolwich Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on zebra crossing, 7th March
item.description:
Pot hole on zebra crossing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on the footbridge, 7th March
item.description:
Going over the railway line footbridge on Picketts Lock Lane N9 there is offensive graffiti saying Free Palestine from Hamas there is also other graffiti here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Picketts Lock Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Offensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Metre long pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Large, deep pothole on bus route, hard to avoid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian guardrail damage, 7th March
item.description:
The pedestrian guardrail in front of 145-147 Silver Street N18, by the junction with Haselbury Road, has been severely damaged. This is presumably as a result of a vehicle having collided with it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tv in alley next to block 46 Cordwell Road SE13 5QY, 7th March
item.description:
2nd reporting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38-41, Cordwell Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked at the drop kerb blocking the entrance., 7th March
item.description:
Unable to exit as car is parked at the drop kerb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Avenue, Hornsey, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping down the back alley, 7th March
item.description:
Flytipping dumped in the alley behind the houses access is down the side of white house flats and 1 Nash Road N9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nash Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of furniture and mattress now in the road too, 7th March
item.description:
The mattress is now obstructing the road aswell as pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198-200, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
